subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Khartum
subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and He Who hath manifested Himself is verily the Most Exalted Pen and the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر انه لهو القلم الاعلی و السدره المنتهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
